name: Network Planner
description: A planning and analytics suite that shows where to expand, which lines need trains, when, and where crowding comes from: system and per-line length, walk-catchment coverage, mode-shift potential, a first-line finder for fresh maps, a ranked build-here-next list, per-line load factor and load-by-hour, and per-line crowding contributors. Optional key-free satellite basemaps.
